name: feature_003_plugin_hook_registration
description: Support registering plugin post-run hooks and invoke them after command execution.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is small feature work because it adds a new plugin capability—post-run hooks—across registration and invocation layers. It is not a disguised bug fix because command registration already works; the new behavior extends the platform.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the new hook path must be plumbed through registry setup, plugin specs, execution, and CLI rendering without breaking existing command resolution.
